channel.title: Radar Anomaly on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Radar Anomaly on Alien Truth Social

item.title: FAA Records Detail Pilot Encounter with Unidentified Object Pacing Aircraft Over Nevada
item.description:
Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) records obtained through a FOIA request detail an unusual aerial encounter over Northern Nevada in May 2025 involving a business jet. Air traffic control audio and internal FAA logs document an object that was visually observed, appeared aircraft-like, and maintained a parallel course with the jet, but was not detected on radar. The object was described with evolving terminology, shifting from an undefined “black” object to something resembling a “fighter” before rapidly ascending and disappearing. The FAA withheld radar data, citing Sensitive Security Information, and the encounter occurred in an area near multiple military testing facilities.

Source: https://www.theblackvault.com/documentarchive/faa-records-detail-pilot-encounter-with-unidentified-object-pacing-aircraft-over-nevada
